titleStmt.title: SII 30.43: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 43. (A.R. No. 120 of 1915.) Tirumurugaṉpūṇḍi, Avinashi Taluk, Coimbatore District Muruganātha temple-on the north wall of the same maṇḍapa Vīrarājēndra: year 29+1: 1237 A.D.

summary.p: Records that a lady Amaṭṭan Sivaṇaimuḻutuḍaiyāḷ gifted four śrī paḻañjalāgai achchu for providing various food offerings (piṭṭu, paṇṇiyāram, appam) on Sundays to the god Tirumurugaṉpūṇḍi-nāyanār.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
kovirācakecaripanmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ virarācentira tevaṟku tirunalliyāṇṭu Irupa
ttonpatāvati netirāvatu cittirai mātam Āḷuṭaiyār tirumurukanpūṇṭi nāyanāṟku tirunāyiṟṟukkiḻa
mai piṭṭamutukku tiruppaṇṇiyārāppattukku Arici nānāḻiyum teṅkāy Onṟum paruppuriyuṅ karuppu
kkaṭṭiyaraip palamum kāṇa Upporupiṭṭu Araipiṭi Aṭaikkā nālu Ilaiyamutu Eṭṭum naraiyanūr nāṭṭi
lirācarācapurattu Ulakuṭai mukkokkiḻāṉaṭi yikaḷil Amaṭṭan civaṉai muḻutuṭaiyāḷen cipaṇṭārattu Oṭukki
ṉa śrīpaḻañcalākai Accu nālu cantirātittavaṟ celvatāka Itu panmākecura rakṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 30.43 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
